ques: Open GitHub Copilot's FAQs to find the official answer to when Copilot chat can be used on mobile.
answer: According to GitHub Copilot's official FAQ ("What languages, IDEs, and platforms does GitHub Copilot support?"), Copilot chat can be used on mobile via the GitHub Mobile app — "All plans are supported in GitHub Copilot in GitHub Mobile." (GitHub Mobile for Copilot Pro and Business get Bing and public repository code search; Copilot Enterprise in GitHub Mobile adds access to your organization's knowledge.)
